chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 80 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For orders on CMA No.4802/2024 (U/A) 29.08.2024 Mr. Mansoor Ali Panhwar, Advocate for the petitioners >>>>>>...<<<<<<< Urgency is granted. Counsel states that the petitioners have also preferred Appeal before respondent No.2 / IGP Sindh and draws attention of the Court to order dated 26.06.2024 passed by a Division Bench of this Court in C.P No.D-386/2024, where matters of like nature were disposed of by giving an option to the petitioners to have their Appeals preferred before the IGP Sindh be decided in accordance with. Copy of the order is referenced. Counsel requests that this petition may also be disposed of in the same terms. In these circumstances, this petition is disposed of in the like manner as per order dated 26.06.2024 in C.P No.D-386/2024 and findings given therein will apply mutatis mutandis to the case of petitioners at hand. Judge Judge ARBROHI
